findings.title: Rollback manifest sentinel _tool_level prevents any rollback
findings.description: _record_rollback_entry stores changes under sentinel key _tool_level. Rollback looks up by real proposal ID. Never finds the changes. All self-healing file modifications are permanent.
findings.recommendation: Thread contextvar or proposal_id parameter from management.py → RepairLoop → AtomicTools.

findings.title: Agent judgment quality — corrected: not a capability boundary
findings.description: CORRECTED: Original finding claimed agent cannot fix non-code failures. This was wrong. The real issue is judgment quality and effort. Agent can install tools via shell_run, search the web, and handle cross-platform — it just needs proper prompt guidance and anti-laziness guardrails.
findings.evidence: wechat_contacts failure was a wrong-approach problem (should have used iLink), not an installation-capability problem. All CLI tools in the ecosystem are designed for AI consumption.
findings.recommendation: No code change needed. Prompt constraints updated in _build_feed_prompt to enforce: do everything yourself first, only ask user when genuinely stuck.

findings.title: _tool_failure_verifier always returns True
findings.description: Placeholder verifier unconditionally passes. Failed repairs reported as success.
findings.recommendation: Implement actual MemoryManager check for new failures after repair timestamp.

findings.title: Missing verifier silently passes
findings.description: When no verifier registered, _verify returns True with warning. Should return False.
findings.recommendation: Return (False, msg) and let retry handle it. Force explicit verifier registration.

findings.title: Management handler blocks during repair
findings.recommendation: Use asyncio.create_task, return immediately, push results via notify_all.

findings.title: No timeout for agent.process_message()
findings.description: Agent hang blocks repair loop indefinitely.

findings.title: Proposal lacks dual-mode validation
findings.description: actions and problem_context can both be set or neither. No runtime guard.

findings.title: Independent verification gap still exists
findings.description: Design promised independent verification; implementation has stub.
findings.recommendation: Implement real verification for each problem type.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Rollback manifest entries keyed under _tool_level sentinel — rollback non-functional
Agent cannot fix non-code failures with feed+verify alone
Verifier stub always returns True — failed repairs reported as success
Missing verifier silently passes — verification is opt-in
No feed timeout — agent hang = permanent block
Verification gap still exists in implementation
